data.title: Implement analyze-test-gate-log.sh phantom mapping detection
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/analyze-test-gate-log.sh for phantom mapping detection (SC2).

## Interface
analyze-test-gate-log.sh [--log-path=<path>]
- Reads audit log, checks each fuzzy-matched entry for real source reference
- Python: grep for import/from statements matching source module
- Bash: grep for source/. commands or function calls matching source filename
- Reports phantoms, skips entries for deleted source files
- Exit 0 = no phantoms, exit 1 = phantoms found

## Output
PHANTOM: source=<path> test=<path> method=fuzzy reason="no import/source/call found"

## Also: chmod +x, remove .test-index RED marker

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/analyze-test-gate-log.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep "analyze-test-gate-log" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "\["; test \$? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
